name: Black Pepper 50g Pouch
description: Premium whole Black Pepper sourced from Sri Lanka. Rich in piperine with a bold, sharp heat and complex aroma — perfect for spiced teas and culinary blends.

ingredients.name: Whole Black Pepper
ingredients.description: Sun-dried, mature Piper nigrum berries harvested at peak ripeness.

benefits.title: Digestive Fire
benefits.description: Piperine stimulates digestive enzymes and improves nutrient absorption.

benefits.title: Immune Boost
benefits.description: Contains natural antimicrobial and antioxidant compounds.

benefits.title: Anti-inflammatory
benefits.description: Piperine is known to reduce inflammation and ease respiratory issues.

benefits.title: Warming Effect
benefits.description: Naturally warms the body and enhances circulation in cold conditions.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Bring water to a rolling boil at 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Pepper
brewing.description: Add 3-5 freshly crushed black pepper corns per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Simmer with your choice of tea for 3-5 minutes to infuse the heat and oils.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve hot. Pairs exceptionally well with ginger and honey.

name: Cinnamon 50g Pouch
description: Convenient and beautifully portioned True Ceylon Cinnamon in individual pouches. The perfect way to enjoy authentic Ceylon cinnamon's warmth and wellness benefits effortlessly every day.

ingredients.name: True Ceylon Cinnamon
ingredients.description: Ground or rolled Ceylon cinnamon portioned into individual filter pouches.

benefits.title: Blood Sugar Balance
benefits.description: Daily cinnamon intake helps maintain stable blood glucose levels.

benefits.title: Anti-inflammatory
benefits.description: Natural cinnamaldehyde reduces chronic inflammation throughout the body.

benefits.title: Digestive Comfort
benefits.description: Naturally relieves bloating and supports smooth digestion.

benefits.title: Warmth & Comfort
benefits.description: A perfectly portioned warming infusion for cold mornings and evenings.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Bring fresh water to a full boil at 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Pouch
brewing.description: Place one cinnamon pouch into your mug.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Pour hot water and steep for 4-6 minutes for a full-flavored cinnamon infusion.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Remove the pouch and enjoy. Naturally sweet — a drop of honey is optional.

name: Turmeric 50g Pouch
description: A potent golden wellness infusion featuring premium turmeric blended with complementary spices and herbs. Nature's most celebrated anti-inflammatory golden superfood in a perfectly crafted cup.

ingredients.name: Premium Turmeric
ingredients.description: High-curcumin ground turmeric root for maximum anti-inflammatory potency.

ingredients.name: Spice Blend
ingredients.description: A supporting blend of black pepper, ginger, and cinnamon to enhance absorption.

benefits.title: Powerful Anti-inflammatory
benefits.description: Curcumin in turmeric is one of the most potent natural anti-inflammatory compounds.

benefits.title: Joint Health
benefits.description: Reduces joint pain, stiffness, and inflammation naturally.

benefits.title: Gut Health
benefits.description: Turmeric promotes a healthy gut lining and supports balanced digestion.

benefits.title: Immunity & Brain
benefits.description: Curcumin boosts brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) and supports immunity.

brewing.title: Boil Water or Milk
brewing.description: Heat fresh water or milk to 90°C-95°C (194°F-203°F).

brewing.title: Add Turmeric Super
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon of Turmeric Super blend per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Stir well and steep for 4-5 minutes, allowing the spices to bloom fully.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve. Best with warm milk and a touch of honey as a Golden Latte.

name: Cinnamon Stick Alba 50g Roll
description: Premium True Ceylon Cinnamon Alba grade sticks in an elegant replica presentation. The finest, most fragrant variety of real Ceylon cinnamon, perfect for gifting or daily wellness.

ingredients.name: Ceylon Cinnamon Alba Grade
ingredients.description: The finest true Ceylon cinnamon with paper-thin, tightly rolled bark.

benefits.title: Blood Sugar Control
benefits.description: Ceylon cinnamon is clinically shown to help moderate blood glucose.

benefits.title: Anti-inflammatory
benefits.description: Natural cinnamaldehyde reduces bodily inflammation and soothes pain.

benefits.title: Heart Health
benefits.description: Helps lower bad cholesterol and promotes healthy blood circulation.

benefits.title: Warming Effect
benefits.description: Naturally warms the body and improves digestive comfort.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Bring fresh water to a rolling boil at 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Cinnamon
brewing.description: Place 1-2 cinnamon sticks into your teapot or saucepan per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Simmer gently for 5-8 minutes to fully release the aromatic oils.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Pour and serve. Naturally sweet — enjoy plain or with a drizzle of honey.
